highlights: Built branded permanent room URLs on meet.genr8ive.ai so invites are frictionless and consistent.
Embedded JaaS meetings directly in a custom domain experience to avoid redirect-heavy UX.
Added signed join links, recording controls, and webhook hooks for production meeting operations.
impact: Reduced meeting setup friction and made recurring calls faster to launch, easier to share, and simpler to manage.
one_liner: Meetings that don't suck: frictionless branded meeting flows with instant secure join links.
problem: Typical meeting flows break momentum with redirects, inconsistent links, and setup friction before people can actually talk.
solution: Implemented a meeting launcher and permanent-room architecture on meet.genr8ive.ai with signed URLs and embedded sessions.
title: Genr8ive Meet
visibility_note: Core repository is private. This entry summarizes architecture and working approach without exposing proprietary source.
